code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import'./Navigation.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navigation=()=>{const[isScrolled,setIsScrolled]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>{setIsScrolled(window.scrollY>50);};window.addEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);return()=>window.removeEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);},[]);const scrollToSection=id=>{const element=document.getElementById(id);if(element){element.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"navigation ".concat(isScrolled?'scrolled':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-logo",children:["JC",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"."})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-links",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>scrollToSection('skills'),children:"SKILLS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>scrollToSection('work'),children:"CASE STUDIES"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>scrollToSection('tools'),children:"TOOLS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>scrollToSection('roles'),children:"ROLE FIT"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"nav-cta",onClick:()=>scrollToSection('cta'),children:"HIRE ME"})]});};export default Navigation;
